creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

please update your portstree and reinstall ImageMagic. 

Current ports tree installs ImageMagic, 6.7.7.7 which installs: 
lib/libMagick++.so.5 

You need to test this port for compatibility with ImageMagic 6.7.7.7. 

then you have a choice. 
do you want to support lib/libMagick++so.[4-9] ? 
LIB_DEPENDS+= Magick++.[4-9]:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/ImageMagick 
only major version 5? 
LIB_DEPENDS+= Magick++.5:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/ImageMagick 

or you don't care what version? 
LIB_DEPENDS+= Magick++:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/ImageMagic
